_rationale: Same signal as B2 (thresh=0.85 + prior_mom), but scales bet size up on consecutive wins: 1.5^streak capped at 2x ($50/trade). After any loss win_streak resets and bet drops back to $25. Effective ladder: streak=0 $25, streak=1 $37.50, streak=2+ $50. max_bet_pct=0.05 (5% of bankroll) is the binding cap — this matches the backtest which hardcodes bankroll*0.05. anti_mart_max=2.0 reflects the actual ceiling. Portfolio daily_limit=$100.
